speaker: Admiral Vey
lines: The sky-engine crashed before midnight.
Prime both shore capacitors, then reclaim the Star Core below.

speaker: Glass Witch Orla
lines: The marsh keeps what falls from the heavens.
Carry charge, not bravado, and it may let you pass.

speaker: Storm Pilot Renn
lines: The shoals only respect current and timing.
Raise the route, then move fast before the tide remembers you.

speaker: Salvager Nox
lines: The first wreck still spits live sparks.
Best loot in the coast is always one step past good sense.

speaker: Archivist Pell
lines: The Reliquary only yields to those who read the old machine prayers.
Take the side vaults if you can. They kept the real prizes there.

speaker: Rena of the Line
lines: The bazaar still stands, so the coast still has a pulse.
Take what you need. If we survive, you can pay me in stories and scrap.

speaker: Smith Dax
lines: Steel is honest. Storms are not.
Bring the engine back and I'll call your tab forgiven.

speaker: Index Shade
lines: Names, ledgers, routes, dead captains. I remember all of them.
Take the records you can carry. The sea keeps the rest.

speaker: Lookout Venn
lines: Every vulture here once followed a ship in.
If you can clear the perch, the engine won't see you coming too soon.

speaker: The Fallen Helmsman
lines: You would wake the engine that buried us?
Then prove your claim in lightning and steel.
